title: SessionConnectRequest
description: Payload sent by AtlasAI to establish a bridge session. Sent as the payload of a BridgeRequestEnvelope targeting SessionService/Connect. Mirrors the SessionConnectRequest struct in Shared/AtlasBridgeContract/include/AtlasBridgeTypes.h.

protocolVersion.description: Bridge protocol version the client expects. If omitted the server uses the envelope-level protocolVersion.

clientVersion.description: Version string of the AtlasAI / Arbiter client, used for compatibility checking.

projectId.description: Identifier of the project the client wants to connect to. Must match a loaded project on the server.
